entry.title: Re: Calculating Bradford Factor and sending Alerts using SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi

We are currently testing the Bradford factor functionality in the system and have encountered an issue with an employee who has one inactive record and one active record. The custom Bradford factor score is not being calculated for this employee. Do you happen to know why the system is not calculating the score for users with inactive and active accounts?

entry.title: Re: Link another production Order while creating production Order in DI API
entry.content: Sometimes, when we do the creation of the Production Order object, we have the -5002 error with this text : Invalid node index; object: %s, node: %s [OWOR.ItemCode][line: 1]

entry.title: How can we map unplanned delivery cost like freight handling charge from Ariba to SAP.
entry.content:
How can unplanned delivery cost like freight , handling charge added at the time of submitting invoice in Ariba , be mapped to particular GL account in SAP , while posting through MIRO. 

Ex- PO created with amount 1000 inr in Ariba
while submitting inv additional amount of handling charge 20 INR is added. 
Now how system determines to which GL this handling charge will post to , once Invoice is interfaced from Ariba to SAP.

entry.title: Re: Search option not working in Fiori apps
entry.content: Were you able to get a fix for this issue?

entry.title: Re: Error message: Incorrect index structure for table XMVERF_POS/SO/line item number.
entry.content: Thanks for the hint! Somebody changed the MRP type of the material after the Sales Order was created.

entry.title: documentation to configure windows AD Single Sign on for SAP Data Services
entry.content:
We're upgranding to DS 4.3 and would like to implement AD SSO for DS Designer.

As we're doing the installation with IPS we need to know what configuration has to be done for this to work.

Is it enough the configure IPS or is it something to be done on Data Services installation side ?

Available to discuss.

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: documentation to configure windows AD Single Sign on...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Please refer this  KBA ##2543369 - How to setup Windows AD SSO for Data Services to configure SSO for designer and Data Services Management Console.

Thanks,

SAP Support

entry.title: Failed to load destination. Caused by: No user token (JWT) has been provided. This is strictly neces
entry.content:
Hi, I am trying to call sap odata service from a cap application uisnng cds spawn job.Using  destination with PrincipalPropagation, But geeting below error: -

logs:-
[cds] - connect to sap_odata > odata-v2 { destination: 'sap_destination', forwardAuthToken: true }
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR [remote] - Error: Error during request to remote service:
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR Failed to load destination.
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR at run (/home/vcap/app/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/remote/utils/client.js:310:31)
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR at async RemoteService.<anonymous> (/home/vcap/app/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/remote/Service.js:276:20)
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR at async next (/home/vcap/app/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/srv/srv-dispatch.js:76:17)
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR at async RemoteService.handle (/home/vcap/app/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/srv/srv-dispatch.js:74:10)
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR at async Object.methodName(/home/vcap/app/srv/util/myfile.js:102:24)
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR at async mycatfile (/home/vcap/app/srv/util/mycatfile.js:524:22) {
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR statusCode: 502,
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR reason: {
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR message: 'Error during request to remote service: \n' +
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR "Failed to load destination. Caused by: No user token (JWT) has been provided. This is strictly necessary for 'PrincipalPropagation'.",
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR request: {
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR method: 'POST',
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR url: '/xxxx/xxxxxx_SRV/dummyEntitySet',
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR headers: {
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR accept: 'application/json,text/plain',
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR 'accept-language': 'en',
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR 'content-type': 'application/json',
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR 'content-length': 311,
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR authorization: 'Bearer ...'
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR }
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR },
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR correlationId: '507a3d4f-bf6d-4296-4cc1-f6b8f070ee2b'
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR }
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR } 

my code :- 

 

cds.spawn({ 
          user: cds.context?.user,
          tenant: cds.context?.tenant,
          headers: cds.context?.headers || req?.headers,
          after: iafterTime }, async (req) => {
         sendToSAP(req, customID)
})

const sendToSAP = async (req, customID) => {   
    const payload = {}  
    const oSAPService = await cds.connect.to("sap_destination")
    let headers = { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
    headers.authorization = cds.context?.headers || req?.headers
      const response = await oSAPService.send({
        method: "POST",
        path: "/xxxx/xxxxxx_SRV/dummyEntitySet",
        data: payload,
        headers: headers
      });
}

 


dependencies :- 

"node": "^18.0.0"
"@sap/cds": "6.8.4"

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports: "maximum report processing job limit"
entry.content:
Hello,

What SP are you using, currently SP 35 is the latest, if you don't have it download it from here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

See my blog on upgrading:

Upgrading a Visual Studio 2008->2022 .NET project with the latest CR .NET SDK packages

Try clearing your cache, Browsers can keep alive the printjob.

CR for VS has always limited users to 3 active printjobs, so something your app is keeping them alive, you need to add debugging or logging steps to see what it's doing.

What OS and version of IIS are you using?

Didn't describe the steps your app is using or any work flow when this happens so it's hard to say what you need to change.

Did it work before, if so what has changed in your environment?

If using another Reporting tool is your only option then good luck on the change.

entry.title: Re: ​Schedule of Analysis for Office workbook in SAC is s...
entry.content:
Hi there,


My name is Alan Golding and I work for an SAP Partner company who developers software for SAP customers. 
We just released a Publishing software that allows you to schedule AO workbooks that are stored in SAC. 

If this topic is still of interest let me know.

Thanks

Alan

entry.title: Re: Are there plans to update the Spring framework within...
entry.content: I would suggest downloading it and checking if the fix is in. CVE's are security issues so info on any CVE's is not available to the public, you require a Support contract to access the gated KBA's. FYI, Crystal Reports itself doesn't use Java, it does use Java Script to handle Parameters, actually it uses HTML5 for prompting. CR Server/BOE does use it but it's also a SAP version of Java and not Oracles.

entry.title: Re: Are there plans to update the Spring framework within...
entry.content:
FYI - Resources for more info:

https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/crystal-reports/faq

CR default home page:

https://support.sap.com/en/product/support-by-product/01200314690800000341.html

All CR/BOE product Help documents, note depending on if you ahve a Support Contract depends on more info available.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CRYSTAL_REPORTS

entry.title: Re: SAP Cyrstal Reports 2020 64 bit and Oracle 19c Databa...
entry.content:
See CR's Data Access excel file for supported Oracle Clients:

https://assets.cdn.sap.com/sapcom/docs/2020/06/b2ec5eaa-9d7d-0010-87a3-c30de2ffd8ff.pdf

Try using ODBC or OLE DB connection and see if that works better

entry.title: Re: How to achieve dynamic selection screen in frontend u...
entry.content:
Unfortunately, we can only be creative with how we use the framework.

I think in your case, instead of having 2 radio buttons, you can have 2 types of views in the list page.

Each view will have its own selection screen fields and result table columns.

You can refer to this link:

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/37aeed74e17a42caa2cba3123f0c15fc

Basically, the first tab represents radio button A and second tab represents radio button B. You can try to play around and feel free to ask if you encountered any challenges.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report Password
entry.content: If you look closer at the log on prompt it's asking you to log into BOE System and not your DB, likely the report uses something in the repository, Universe or formula etc.

Do you get at least the Action in order to trigger it, or is the action already missing? I would suggest to create customer case (incident), so that it can be analyzed.

Udo

entry.title: Table and Field for Customer Invoice Status VF03
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are working on a report and we need the invoice status whether it's completed or canceled or credit memo created. I am using VBRK-RFBSK. Is it the correct field? is there any other field or FM for fetching invoice status?

Also when I am checking VBRK-RFBSK at table level it is showing A or B or C so on.

 

how can we fetch this text as well??

Thanks,
Aravind

entry.title: BAPI action group connection error
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to follow the below tutorial as-is to see how a BAPI action group would work for an on-premise S/4 system. However, I get a connection failed error without any further details.

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-bapi-actiongroup.html

Not sure, if we have to explicitly add the BAPI SDK under dependencies. But, I have added it as well.

Our on-prem system properties looks like this:

I sign in using an Id and password and we also have a VPN that we need to be connected to (Not sure if that matters).

Can I have any experts advice what type of connection should I choose in the BAPI action group? I have tried all combinations of connection type even though some of them are not relevant. I get 'connection error' for all of them.

I also have the desktop agent installed and is in attended mode.

Is there any other setting that needs to be taken care of, eg: in the backend system? Has anyone experienced this issue before?

Tagging expert: @Dan_Wroblewski

entry.title: Re: Preview function in the service binding does not work and starts Notepad
entry.content: Yes, enabling the draft functionality for managed scenario in V4 service has enabled my create button. Thank you for the inputs guys!

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hello @julieplummer20 , sorry to ask again, or perhaps you missed my earlier question. As @ralf_henning indicated over here, we should be able to get a reasonably recent SAP GUI shortly after 2022 is released. Is this still planned? 

Unfortunately I have several issues with the dated version that's currently available for download, most notably that it doesn't play nicely with Eclipse on a Mac. Anything html, including many popup messages, won't display the content so I'm really hoping a version 8 GUI will fix this kind of issue:

entry.title: Re: Include in job log the values of datastore configurat...
entry.content: Good to know that substitution parameters *can* be referenced in scripts.

entry.title: Re: Stop creation of maintenance work order
entry.content:
Hi Arif

If the Functional Location is Inactive, then all the equipment under this Fl is inactive. 

You need to inactive the FL & EQ, also the maintenance plan

Regards

Terence

entry.title: Re: Change System Status in PM order dependend to order Type
entry.content:
Hi,

What is the issue you are facing with one order type ? Share the screenshot of the error and give your explanation clearly.

Regards

Terence

entry.title: Re: Include in job log the values of datastore configurat...
entry.content:
Good to know that substitution parameters *can* be referenced in scripts. But when I run a simple batch job that contains nothing more than a script that references a substitution parameter...

print('[$$UserDir]');

...where $$UserDir is set to "\\Server1\UserDir\" for the job's selected system configuration, the value of the substitution parameter is not displayed, and the following error occurs:

Syntax error at line <50> : <SET ("job_GV_$Condition1" = '\'N'', "job_GV_$G_ContainerCost" = '0.10000', ...

I've tried using variations of the substitution parameter (e.g., [$UserDir], [UserDir], $[UserDir], $$[UserDir], $[$$UserDir]). All such variations tend to simply generate a syntax error that lists the values of many (all?) the job's variables.

What am I missing?

Update: Looks like the problem is the use of backslashes. When I change $$UserDir from "\\Server1\UserDir\" to "//Server1/UserDir/" no error occurs and the value of the substitution parameter is displayed.

entry.title: SAP CPI - Event Mesh - Message monitoring and multiple runs for iFlow
entry.content:
Hello Community!

So, I have this iFlow that consumes a message from the Event Mesh and does X. This is good most of the times, but sometimes I will see this in the log:

The process is configured to redeliver a message 1 time on the Event Mesh side, and to try reprocessing a message 1 time on the iFlow, and so when I tested this, I could see 2 runs for a failed message. 

However here I see multiple runs (3 or 4 depending on the day), and I can see all runs in status completed.  Furthermore, unlike my testing, all these runs have processed a different message from Event Mesh, so it looks like all these runs are all bundled for some reason, and I have no idea why. I have also confirmed that all runs were successful, since I see the result in the destination system.

I thought this "runs" section was showing all the runs for a given message that failed on a previous run, but this is not the case.

I know I am missing something; I just don't know what.

I am happy to provide any more details that might be needed. Any tip will be helpful!

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP Data Analyst Certification
entry.content: Thanks for sharing Megan! Great way to stay relevant in today's competitive job market.

entry.title: What happens when a Data Flow fails?
entry.content:
You are using DSP as a Data Fabric to load multiple data sources, and all works great, and you can enjoy life (you know, teleworking from some heavenly place) ... until something goes wrong. You receive an email that a Data Flow has failed. That SFTP seems to be not as reliable as it should be, so now what?

Leave your Virgin Mojito and open DSP.

 

 

 

 

Test definition

The test consists of loading a CSV with 30,000 rows by means of a Data Flow, and to provoke an error in the middle of the process, to see what we obtain in the destination table.

The CSV has 30000 rows, with two fields:

  • ID: consecutive numeric
  • VAL: string with the value '1' in all rows except 20101 which has a 'AAA'.

The source is SFTP, configuring the CSV as:

  • ID as Int32
  • VAL as String(1).
  • Control Fetch Size active to 1000 rows.
  • Fail Run on String Truncate = On. This will cause row 20101 to give an error for exceeding the defined size of string(1).

The destination is a DSP local table with

  • ID: int32
  • VAL: String (1)
  • Control Fetch Size active to 1000 rows.

 

Test Results

The execution of the data flow ends with error.

In the destination table, data has been saved, specifically the IDs ranging from 1 to 19000.
So I draw two conclusions:
- The most important is that the DF execution is not an “all or nothing” type, and commits have been made during the process.
- The second conclusion is that as we have two fetch controls, in source and in destination, it seems that this makes that the block of rows 19,001-20,000 has not been loaded even if it did not have any error, surely, when the block of 1,000 rows with error was read the exception was thrown, and the part that saves in the destination had not yet processed the block of 19,001-20,000, and that is why we do not have it.

I did a second test by increasing the rows to 110,000, leaving the wrong row at 105,001, and removing the fetch size control on both sides, to check if the theoretical maximum limit of the fetch size is 100,000.
But it saved from row 1 to 104,000 ... implying that the fetch size was not 100,000. I don't know if the value it takes depends on the source, the combination of them, etc.

 

Which implies

When doing ETLs with delta loads that are manually managed based on e.g. timestamps, there is a risk that when an error occurs, rows from a failed load are left in the target table.
This may cause the calculation of the next timestamp to be loaded to be erroneous, so these rows should be deleted before their calculation.

entry.title: Knowledge Graphs - Datasphere vs HANA Cloud
entry.content:
There are some key differences between the graph capabilities in SAP HANA Cloud and the new announcement SAP Datasphere knowledge graph:

1. SAP HANA Cloud has had a powerful graph engine for analyzing complex relationships in business data for a while now. It allows creating graph workspaces from existing tables/views, querying graphs using openCypher, writing custom graph algorithms, and visualizing graphs.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-hana-graph-resources/ba-p/13505490

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oaSQu9laYKE

 

2. Datasphere Creating knowledge graphs manually is very costly, so SAP Datasphere comes to help by automatically pre-populating them using content already available in SAP Datasphere like connections to source systems, tables, foreign keys etc. SAP Datasphere knowledge graph is a new capability announced in March 2024. As data is onboarded and integrated into SAP Datasphere, it automatically creates an ontology representing the relationships in the data, including business context from SAP sources like S/4HANA

caption by SAP. Currently in Preview

 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PQrFjthwOWQ&t=169

https://news.sap.com/2024/03/future-of-data-driven-business-new-sap-datasphere-capabilities/

Conclusion

While the SAP HANA Cloud graph is more for custom graph algorithm development and analysis, the SAP Datasphere knowledge graph is an automated capability that provides a rich context for generative AI use cases by capturing complex data relationships and metadata. The two serve different but complementary purposes in the SAP data and analytics portfolio.

Additional information:
https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/how-use-sap-hana-cloud-graph-model-analyze-complex-your-holitschke

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-hana-graph-resources/ba-p/13505490

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/native-hana-vs-sap-datasphere-findings/qaq-p/12689997

https://www.techzine.eu/blogs/data-management/117331/sap-expands-datasphere-with-knowledge-graph-and-compass/

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-datasphere-is-an-alternative-of-sap-hana-modelling-with-more-features/qaq-p/12701049

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/access-sap-hana-cloud-underneath-of-sap-datasphere/ba-p/13569825

https://developers.sap.com/group.hana-aa-graph-overview.html

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?

entry.title: Re: ISAGENT_MIN_J5 component is not installed
entry.content: Hello Vera, many thanks for your reply! You give a really good guidance! First things first, you are right! My colleague only imported the cimsap files, so I thought we have an up to date CR content, but we didn't! I fixed that, I launched the report RLAPI_MANUAL_SINGLE_SYNC against the Solman Java system. Unfortunately it didn't help! I also checked SAP note 3297242, but the system says that the note can't be implemented. So I am further stuck on this and this point is still red 😞 Do you have any further ideas please ? Many thanks!

entry.title: HANA Wrong File
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We installed a new HANA DB and an S4HANA Server. Everything worked perfectly. However, we've now found that the HANA filesystems were completely reorganized or moved. No one has moved or changed these data. Thus, the HANA DB doesn't start. The files are now located on the OS as follows: /hana/shared/SID/global/hdb/data/mnt00001 (the mnt00001 file is located here). On another server, where the HANA DB starts without any issues, there is no mnt00001 file in this directory. Additionally, the SID directory under /hana/data/ has been found missing. Similarly, the SID directory under /hana/log/ has also been found missing.
We created an SID directory under /hana/log/ and /hana/data/. Then, we moved the mnt00001 file from /hana/shared/SID/global/hdb/data/mnt00001 to /hana/log/SID and /hana/data/SID. After that, we created a link from /hana/shared/SID/global/hdb/data to /hana/data/SID and from /hana/shared/SID/global/hdb/log to /hana/log/SID. And we were able to start the database.

How can we resolve this without a symbolic link?

 

Many Thanks

Best Regards

Tuncay

entry.title: Need information
entry.content:
Hi SAP Family,

I am beginner in SAP field, looking for guidance

Thank you so much in advance 

 

Regards 

Rashmi

entry.title: SAP Data Archiving
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

I have such an issue that I am working on, and I wonder if you have had a similar situation.
Let's say the company archives files and we have several application servers.
On one particular server, there is a dedicated disk where the file is archived.
The address is written in the transaction FILE, where you specify the logical path.
The situation is as follows: on the first application where the disk is allocated, Files are archived if only that application is enabled and others are disabled.
If other applications are enabled, the file is not physically archived, and it says that a specific archived file cannot be opened.
Have you ever had a similar situation, and if so, how did you solve a similar problem?

 Rashmi

entry.title: Re: Write permissions to SAP Datasphere via OAuth and RES...
entry.content:
Hi Håkan,

I see you've also posted a related question too here Is writing to SAP Datasphere using OData4 / REST supported?

I could add more comments. SAP Datasphere has OData API for both Catalog and Consumption but all APIs are GET --only for reading from external app--

If you meant pushing data from external with REST / OData API to Datasphere it's not available. But you can pull data via OData connection in Datasphere with OAuth authentication, see Generic OData Connections

Regards,
Tuncay

My submission for week 5 !

We would like to host a SAP CodeJam in Wroclaw, Poland on 5 July 2024. On 6 July 2024 will be organized SAP Inside Track in Wroclaw.

Topic: "SAP Fiori elements flexible programming model"
Time: 5.07.2024
Capacity: ~25 persons

Best regards,

Anna Wilk

entry.title: Data binding issue in sap UI5
entry.content:
Hello,
I am new to Fiori front-end development and I was given a request to change the description of an already existing field. It seemed pretty easy. I have made the text dynamic by using TVARVC values. But after changing the field heading, the value entered in that field is not getting captured. 
Initially the Field name used to be "Pieces" and based on the plant it should display as "Pieces/Layers". The data entered in the field is getting captured if it is either "Pieces" or "Layers" but when I display it as "Pieces/Layers" i am getting the issue. 
I thought it maybe due to the length of the text and tried different combinations but nothing worked. 
Can someone please let me know why these kind of errors may occur and where can I look in the code or which file maybe helpful to resolve this issue? 

all the other fields are working as expected.


Thank you.

Regards,

Omkar S.

We hired a valid license from a certified SAP partner in Chile.

 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - AI Services - Week 5
entry.content: Here's my Submission. Thank you Nora for this challenge around the AI Service

entry.title: Re: SAP Cyrstal Reports 2020 64 bit and Oracle 19c Databa...
entry.content:
That is the Oracle.NET driver, not the standard Oracle client. You need to have the full version of the Oracle Client installed with a tnsnames.ora file configured in order to fully use the native Oracle connection type in Crystal.

The Oracle.NET driver requires loading the full .NET framework and then working through that.  The regular Oracle Client doesn't have the overhead of loading .NET and is much faster.

-Dell

entry.title: My Client is Facing issue with T,code FAGLLO3H Report.Supplier name is showing but S.Code is missing
entry.content: My Client is Facing issue with T,code FAGLLO3H Report.Supplier name is showing but Supplier Code is missing.It is showing with other GL Accounts but not for the specific one GL.Attaching screenshot for the reference.

entry.title: Is it possible to create and Exception with MC/1 for the sum of valuated stock of two warehouses?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am trying to create an Exception in MC.1 with MC/1 Exception Creation, but I need to check as threshold value, the total SUM of two warehouses at the same time.

Let say I have one work center, and two warehouses. The point is to create an exception for the total value sum of the Valuated Stock for both warehouses taking into account the sum of the two warehouses at the same time, instead of each one separatedly.

Example:

 

Valuated stock at Warehouse A = 1000 EUR

Valuated stock at Warehouses B = 1500 EUR

Exception value = A+B > 2000 EUR.

 

Is that possible?

 

Regards.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content: That would be fantastic, thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: Electronic Invoicing in Malaysia
entry.content: You pick your provider, SAP DRC then signs.

entry.title: Re: Service entry sheet mass upload / Replacement of ML81...
entry.content:
Thank you. I tried MM_PUR_SES_UPLOAD and filled in the three tabs but always received the following error even I haven't changed the account assignment. What was wrong in my file?

Header:

Header ID* (10)Name of Service Entry Sheet* (40)Reference Purchase Order* (10)Posting Date for Goods Receipt
0000000001Test/Support/05/2024770034192020240529

Item:

Header ID* (10)Item ID* (5)Purchase Order Item* (5)Performance Start Date*Performance End DateItem Description (40)Stated Quantity* (10dec3)Account Assignment Category ** (1)Has multiple Account Assignments** (TRUE/FALSE/Blank)Work Item ID (10)Service Performer (10)Is Final Entry (TRUE/FALSE/Blank)
0000000001000100001020240529  0,01     

Account Assignment (U in PO):

Header ID* (10)Item ID* (5)Acct Assgmt ID* (2)Quantity** (10dec3)G/L Account** (10)Asset** (12)Subnumber** (4)Sales Order** (10)Sales Order Item** (6)Cost Center** (10)Order** (12)Network** (12)Activity** (4)WBS Element** (8)
000000000100010000010,01          

When I kept the last sheet of account assignment empty, I received an ABAP runtime error.

entry.title: Re: Next button missing Guided Tour SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi J,

Unfortunately, it is not clear what is going wrong because you have selected the option that should make the Next button appear.  It's almost like the context is changing from one step to the next so the GT thinks there is no next step.  I think that you will need to get support involved with this one so raise a ticket using Component ID KM-SEN-CMP and get them to take a look in more detail.

Regards
Shane

I have a query with non-cumulative key figures (Stock).

If I input some value in the filter for Plant (Centro) the query runs OK. But, if I try to filter like this:

I get the following errors:

 

Does anyone know how to fix this errors?

I want to run the query without having to input the plant.

Attached is a screenshot of the stock parameter configuration in the InfoCube.

entry.title: Need to send E-Mail for the same partner.
entry.content:
Hello Experts;

 

Need your help with this requirement; we have created an output that will trigger an E-Mail to the Ship-to Party of the deliveries we added into that shipment.

In test environment I created 5 Deliveries from 5 Individual sales orders (3 With different Ship-to partners and 2 with same Ship-to party created on purpose).

The E-mail’s body says “Dear (Ship-to name); we are generating (Shipment number) for your (Sales Order number)”

Upon creating the Shipment, only 4 outputs are determined since there are 4 Ship-to parties and as per SAP’s std. design we cannot have 2 outputs for the same partner.

 

Ship-to #1 --> SO# 2601 --> Delivery# 80001987 --> Output gets determined

Ship-to #2 --> SO# 2602 --> Delivery# 80001988 --> Output gets determined

Ship-to #3 --> SO# 2603 --> Delivery# 80001989 --> Output gets determined

Ship-to #4 --> SO# 2604 --> Delivery# 80001990 --> Output gets determined

Ship-to #4 --> SO# 2605 --> Delivery# 80001991 --> Output DOES NOT get determined, Since the Output already exist for this Ship-to.

 

In this case we still need to have a fifth E-Mail sent to Ship-to #4 since this customer has 2 different Sales Orders (2604 & 2605) being shipped in the same shipment; Would it be possible achieve this?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Best of Suite vs. Modern Data Stack
entry.content:
I just have seen a talk between Martin Kleppmann and Jesse Anderson about “Designing A Data-Intensive Future” from GOTO 2023 event. Martin Kleppmann and he said “When you get to large data workload, if you have a single tool that can do everything, the only way that can do that is by doing everything badly.“

I think this is a basic idea where the Modern Data Stack (MDS) evolve from. The idea of Modern Data Stack and how it evolved, is described in my former blog Data Architecture with SAP – Modern Data Stack. Over the time many characteristics where added what a MDS must archive:

 

Fig. 1: Characteristics of the Modern Data Stack

The idea was, to create a Best-of-Breed software architecture for data, which brought together the best fit of data capabilities needed to create maximum of value from data for the enterprise. But is this idea of having always the best tool doing this job is still valid?

While Best-of-Breed is not a new idea, we have seen the pendulum swings from Best-of-Breed to Best-of-Suite in the data world and back again. Currently even the end of the MDS was proclaimed. Why? Because over time several developments happend:

  • Customers became more price sensitive and data tools became standard in companies. Standards are goal for optimization so it is easier to manage licences, support, etc by one or at least a few reduces complexity and costs.

  • Differentiation between providers is increasingly disappearing. The evolution of cloud services is fast. From the capability perspective Best-of-Suite solutions like SAP and Oracle catched up. It is more about evolution speed, partnership and details now.

  • MDS is converging to a Best-of-Suite. I see that particularly for Google Cloud with BigQuery in the center of the stack where Google is able to offer a End-to-End approach and simliar for Databricks except the BI part. Snowflake is possibly still the most representative MDS data platform and really celebrating the ecosystem idea with strong partnerships. But they are also growing there own stack with innovations like Streamlit, Snowpipe and Snowpark.

  • Customers coming from one side shifting over time to a mixed scenario to adapt to the advantages of the other side. Means customer starting e. g. with Databricks on Microsoft Azure adapting more and more Azure services over time as the Suite approach making things easier (integration, less vendors, good enough services, …). Same If you start with a suite but extend for new BI tools, ETL/ELT and other components to complete or compensate.

  • Best-of-Suite vendors like SAP are embracing data ecosystems with partners like Collibra, DataRobot, Confluent and Databrick to close gaps and offer alternatives for a better adaption of the data stack.

  • Maybe a short term trend but something I see, is the shifted focus from data to AI with the ChatGPT/LLM hype. Maybe this pendelum will come back when people understand that data is the base for AI and even more for data-centric AI (compared to discriminative/generative AI).

  • Once I read, the biggest lie of a data architecture picture is that there is only one data platform in the middle. There is at least one old, one new, one from an acquisition, in germany at least you will find a extra one for HR. From a certain size or complexity companies today have several data platforms and redundant tools. It’s the new normal somehow.

The last aspect brings us to a new perspective. We need maybe best of both worlds because every world (Best-of-Suite / Best-of-Breed) have their advantaged (and disadvantages).

 

Fig 2: Combining characteristics of Best-of-Breed (MDS) and Best-of-Suite (here: SAP) 

So now if we think a little bit further, these worlds are converging into a open ecosystem which not only adapts to the best fit for creating value from data, but also adapt optimal to the operational ecosystem like SAP driven enterprises as a next level of ecosystems.

 Fig. 3: Convergence of MDS and Best-of-Suite vendors into a data ecosystem

We thougt deeply about this development in our latest whitepaper about SAP & Modern Data Stack available here (1) (in german only at the moment).

An extended excerpt can be found here with Snowflake and here with Databricks.

What do you think or experience where data stacks evolve? Is one vendor delivering everything for you and doing well? Do you build an ecosystem of tools to solve complex problems or is the MDS-approach still the best helping you in your daily data business?

-----------------------

This blog was initially posted on Substack.

----------------------- 

(1) https://www.infomotion.de/whitepaper-sap-modern-data-stack

What other option can use? I dont Find CDS to get Long Text from item in FI document.

entry.title: Re: Adapting to technical annex 1.9 for Colombia: Updates for SAP S/4HANA and SAP ERP
entry.content:
Hello @aleshane_ghisleri,

Is there a way you can share XML structure generated by SAP for an invoice in foreign currency (ex. USD) for Colombia?

Im struggling with XML creation to be approved by DIAN. 

My current issue is in attached screen.

All these notes are already implemented in our ECC system.

  • SAP Note 3420596 - Technical annex 1.9 for Colombia: Rounding removal and healthy taxes
  • SAP Note 3426328 - Technical annex 1.9 for Colombia: Foreign currency proxy changes
  • SAP Note 3459015 - Technical annex 1.9 for Colombia: Foreign currency proxy changes - Part 2#colombia #annexversion1.9

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports: "maximum report processing job limit"
entry.content:
Hi Don, thank you for your attention. I'm answering here because can't find an "answer" button for your comment

Try clearing your cache, Browsers can keep alive the printjob: I'll will investigate how to do that.

CR for VS has always limited users to 3 active printjobs, so something your app is keeping them alive, you need to add debugging or logging steps to see what it's doing: do you need some piece of code or my app?

What OS and version of IIS are you using? Windows Server 2012 R2. IIS 8.5.9600.16384

Didn't describe the steps your app is using or any work flow when this happens so it's hard to say what you need to change: do you need some piece of code or my app?

Did it work before, if so what has changed in your environment? It always happens in the production environment.

If using another Reporting tool is your only option then good luck on the change: yes, I know, that's why I want to keep using CR.

Regards

Demacom

entry.title: Re: ISAGENT_MIN_J5 component is not installed
entry.content: Dear Customer, what what now? It takes several hours to sync the content from SLD to LMDB. It's suggested to clear the browser cache and execute the step again.

entry.title: Re: Need guidance
entry.content:
Hi,

 

run transaction code OB53 there will be two columns PL Statmt acct type and Account enter x in the first column and leave the account column blank.

Then you must most likely need to also create the G/L account, that you want to post to.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: Approval Matrix in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi

This was a big problem for me, the solution was to make an add-on that reads the authorized sketches and saves them. I created a user in SAP called "automation" with the indirect license to perform the processing, so I know that it was my "little robot" that recorded the sketch.

Rgs

Fabio

SAP 9.3 PL14 - SQL SERVER 2014

entry.title: Re: remote access SQL Management Studio installed in Azur...
entry.content:
Hello, I don't know how your server is, but in the Microsoft AZ-900 course I made for external access you must release the Public IP and accept connections, read this post that I did this in the course and I was able to access the server.

https://stackoverflow.com/questions/76590409/how-to-enable-public-access-to-azure-sql-database

https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-sql/database/firewall-configure?view=azuresql

Of course, you'll have to be the admin of everything to make these settings.

Rgs

Fabio

SAP 9.3 PL14 - SQL SERVER 2014.

entry.title: Re: Error of Posting Period while making AP invoice
entry.content:
Hi.

Depending on the document, if it is a document that has a journal entry and the general ledger has already closed the month, the user will have to change the date of the document before changing the outline to the current month, but if it has not yet closed the month or if it is a document that does not generate an LCM (for example, purchase order, Sales Order, Purchase Request), just open the month and ask the user to add it.

Of course, you can make some improvements to the system. I made an alert here where it warns the user that there is a document to authorize, and there is an authorized document that must be released.

Rgs

Fabio.

SAP 9.3 PL14 - SQL SERVER 2014

entry.title: How to Handle VMI on Subcontracted Assemblies
entry.content:
Background:
We are currently transitioning to a Vendor Managed Inventory (VMI) model for a specific motor part that is used in two different higher-level assemblies (BOMs). One BOM will continue to use the motor we purchase directly from the manufacturer A, while the other BOM will use the same motor part number supplied directly to our subcontractor through a VMI program. Critical to note these motors are exactly the same and have the same material master.
Goal:
Our primary goal is to ensure accurate demand planning and avoid over-purchasing the motor we buy directly and send to subcontractor number 1. We need to make sure that the consumption of the VMI motor at the subcontractor number 2 is properly reflected in our SAP system so that it is considered when calculating the overall demand for the motor.
Challenges:

  • The VMI motor and the directly purchased motor share the same material master and part number, making it difficult to distinguish between them in SAP. That material master is used on two BOMs. One BOM is manufactured by subcontractor A and one is manufacturered by subcontractor B.
  • We need to find a way to automatically capture the VMI motor usage at the subcontractor and integrate it into our demand planning process.
    Potential Solutions:
    We are exploring the following solutions within SAP to achieve our goal:
  • Consumption-Based Planning (MRP): We want to leverage MRP to calculate the overall demand for the motor based on the consumption of both BOMs. This requires accurate recording of the VMI motor usage at the subcontractor (e.g., through goods issue transactions).
  • Subcontracting with Component Supplied by Vendor: We are investigating if this functionality can help us automatically track the VMI motor usage. This would involve creating a subcontracting purchase order where the vendor supplies the motor directly to the subcontractor, and the consumption is automatically recorded in SAP.
    Questions for the SAP Community:
  • Has anyone successfully implemented either of these solutions (MRP or Subcontracting) to track VMI motor usage and integrate it into demand planning?
  • Are there any specific configuration steps or best practices we should be aware of when setting up these processes in SAP?
  • Are there any alternative solutions or workarounds within SAP that we should consider?
  • Any insights or advice on potential challenges or pitfalls we might encounter during implementation would be greatly appreciated.
    We are open to any suggestions or recommendations from the SAP community on how to best achieve our goal of accurate demand planning and inventory management for this motor part.

entry.title: Migration of user personalization from Classic Home (Fiori Groups) to Spaces and Pages
entry.content:
Hi SAP Support,

We are planning to migrate from the Classic Home Page (Fiori Groups) to Spaces and Pages. We'd like to explore options for automatically transferring user customizations from the My Home page to the new Home Page. Ideally, this would involve a mass activation process that imports personalized settings for all users, rather than manually migrating for one user.

Specifically, we want to ensure that user adaptations like added apps, created groups, converted tiles to links, and saved bookmarks are transferred to the new My Home page within Spaces and Pages.

Could you please share any relevant Knowledge Base Articles (KBAs) or documentation on how to achieve this user personalization migration before the switch to Spaces and Pages?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Migration of user personalization from Classic Home (...
entry.content:
Hello there,

I hope you're doing well.

 

Please check out the SAP Community blog:

  • SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – How to migrate from groups to spaces and pages

Other invaluable resources:

  • How to find what Fiori apps has the Spaces and Pages layout
  • External reference Tutorial (YouTube) expert user: How to migrate groups to spaces and pages
  • SAP Learning Hub (How to create spaces and pages) Tutorial
  • KBA 3436068 - Fiori migration from Classic to Spaces and Pages Mode Info on Importing Personalization

 

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Is it not possible to perform inspection for incoming goods using RFUI in embedded EWM ?
entry.content:
Is it not possible to perform inspection for incoming goods using RFUI in embedded EWM ?

The requirement is to scan an inspection slip printed during GR and perform inspection using RF.

entry.title: How to skip inspection rule usage in EWM ?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have the below requirement.

1) Receive goods into an IM location and perform inspection.

2) After inspection, the goods are transferred to EWM.

3) "01" inspection is active and inspection is method chosen in EWM is based on material master and not rule.

4) System creates an inspection lot also for the transfer delivery (DIG) during GR ?

How can we avoid this ?

Authorization

entry.title: Re: SAP Digital Manufacturing Interactive Value Journeys (IVJs)
entry.content:
Is it possible to translate the pages to differet languaes?

Even after chnaging the language from the dropdown, it is providing a limited translation.

entry.title: How can I upload a public key of SFTP server into BTP CPI.
entry.content:
I need upload a public key of an SFTP server into SAP BTP CPI  to read a file .But always getting an error "cannot load key".

Steps followed :
1. Created a new file called test_key.pub and copy pasted the public received.
2. Navigate to BTP CPI->Security Materials -> Manage Keystore ->Add -> SSH key.
3. Entered the Region,Alias,Common name etc.

entry.title: About Business Partner Supplier Company and Customer Company Credit Memo Payment Terms
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I used OData V2 API: Business Partner (A2X) to do the Create or Update the Business Partner Data

We want to set the [Credit Memo Payment Terms] same with [Payment Terms]

But in this API it has not this [Credit Memo Payment Terms] Schema

Can I ask for, If I set the Schema [Payment Terms] but I have not set the [Credit Memo Payment Terms]

Will there be any impact? Or can I have some [Credit Memo Payment Terms] information to know what does this Schema do?
